Pair was absent from route do-not-merge.

guard_summary.excluded_existing_overrides: Inspected data/identity-overrides/merges.json in its durable alias_id -> target_id shape under .aliases.<kind>; route and corridor aliases already present there were excluded.
guard_summary.excluded_prior_batches: Inspected visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*-prep.json artifacts. Visible prep files currently run through identity123; rg found no visible identity124 or identity125 prep artifact by filename/content search. All proposed alias ids were checked absent from visible prior prep aliases/proposed_aliases.
guard_summary.do_not_merge: Checked data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json for proposed route/corridor pairs. The tempting M15 Limited pair route_m15-limited-2010-06-09 -> route_m15-local-limited was omitted because do-not-merge explicitly says route_m15-local-limited is a bundled/compound M15 local/limited reference and must not fold into a single variant.
guard_summary.route_guard: Kept only exact route_id matches with compatible service variant/type. Did not merge local/SBS/LTD/express/subway variants across conflicting service identities.
guard_summary.corridor_guard: Kept only same-street/same-borough corridor records with no conflicting limits, boroughs, phase-specific identity, or geography.

command_evidence.command: rg --files data/identity-overrides data/review_notes data/canonical wiki 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,240p'
command_evidence.purpose: Located override artifacts, visible identity prep notes, and route/corridor canonical JSONL files.
Confirmed no visible identity124/identity125 prep artifact or reference in the inspected paths.
Confirmed merges.json uses per-kind alias_id -> target_id maps under .aliases.

command_evidence.command: node read-only grouping over data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl with exclusions from merges.json and codex-identity-batch*-prep.json
command_evidence.purpose: Found remaining route/corridor same-identity candidates after excluding already applied/prepared aliases.
Checked proposed pairs and nearby candidates against explicit do-not-merge guards; M15 was excluded.

command_evidence.command: jq record extraction for selected route/corridor ids from data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Captured route_id, service variant/type, borough/geography, source_ids, and evidence_refs used in each proposal.
